optionalAssetFields.sourceFile: Original design/source file path when distinct from runtime assets.
optionalAssetFields.exportVariants: Named export variants with format, size, and runtime path.
optionalAssetFields.designNotes: Production notes such as safe zones, slice edges, and visual constraints.
optionalAssetFields.agentInstructions: Short implementation instructions that coding agents must follow.

supportedSubroles.panel-edge: Panel edge/border ornament class. Use role frame and intendedComponent AelunorPanelFrame. Future files should be named panel-edge-top/right/bottom/left.

assets.intendedComponent: AelunorIconFrame when framed; plain img only for brand identity
assets.accessibility: Use alt="Aelunor" for brand identity, alt="" and aria-hidden for decorative use.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Preserve square aspect ratio.
assets.notes: Frontend runtime has icon only; horizontal logo lives in brand source and legacy runtime.

forbiddenUsage: cropped CSS sprites without manifest update
assets.accessibility: Do not expose in runtime UI.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Not applicable.
assets.notes: Reference sheet, not a production component asset.

assets.accessibility: Decorative: aria-hidden, pointer-events none, user-select none.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Use as contained overlay; do not use it as layout content.
assets.notes: Frame overlay sits above surface and below content/corners.

assets.accessibility: Decorative: aria-hidden, pointer-events none, user-select none.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Use contain overlay; lower opacity on narrow screens if needed.
assets.notes: Hero frame is an ornament for a larger framed box.

assets.accessibility: Decorative pseudo-element only.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Button text remains real text; frame may scale with button.
assets.notes: Legacy button-frame scaling is accepted for this button-specific asset.

assets.accessibility: Decorative pseudo-element only.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Button text remains real text; frame may scale with button.
assets.notes: Legacy button-frame scaling is accepted for this button-specific asset.

assets.accessibility: Decorative: aria-hidden, pointer-events none, user-select none.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Preserve aspect ratio; clamp size against panel width.
assets.notes: Corner assets are anchored ornaments, never parent backgrounds.

assets.accessibility: Decorative: aria-hidden and no meaningful text in image.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Fixed height with contain background to avoid layout shift.
assets.notes: Use only as visual separator.

assets.notes: Use only as visual separator.

assets.accessibility: Frame is decorative; icon child supplies meaning or is hidden.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Contain background around semantic icon.
assets.notes: Keep icon and frame separate.

assets.accessibility: May be decorative with alt="" when the HubSidebar button exposes a real text label or accessible name. Do not use filename alt text. Do not use as text replacement.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Preserve square icon aspect ratio inside the sidebar navigation slot.
assets.notes: Semantic Hub navigation icon. Keep separate from icon-frame-circle decorative frame.

assets.accessibility: Decorative layer must be aria-hidden or pseudo-element.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Repeat at stable tile size; do not affect layout.
assets.notes: Texture opacity should stay subtle.

assets.accessibility: Decorative empty-state illustration: use alt="" and aria-hidden when surrounding text explains the empty state. Do not use filename alt text.
assets.responsiveBehavior: Preserve square aspect ratio; scale within the empty-state card without causing layout shift.
assets.notes: Transparent WebP derived from provided PNG. Keep separate from icon-frame-circle decorative frame and sidebar navigation icons.

assets.notes: Never use inside framed panels.
